indicators.name: no stove or oven
indicators.rationale: A stove or oven is essential for cooking.

indicators.name: no sink
indicators.rationale: A sink is essential for food preparation and cleaning.

indicators.name: no hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present.

indicators.name: no cooking utensils or appliances
indicators.rationale: No cooking tools or appliances are visible.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There is no stove, oven, sink, or hard prep surfaces, and no cooking utensils or appliances are visible. The space is clearly designed for relaxation rather than cooking.
